name: Freezer Mix Skillet Goulash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the freezer mix in a large skillet until the meat is browned.
2. Drain off any excess fat.
3. Stir in the tomatoes (with their liquid) and remaining ingredients.
4. Break up the tomatoes.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and cover; simmer, stirring occasionally, until the noodles are tender, about 20 minutes. If necessary, add a small amount of water.
